nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms

East wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
